@title BudgetController
 @notice Tracks per-user daily spending limits and cumulative outflows for the day.
@notice Record spend for msg.sender; reverts if over daily limit (when limit > 0).

@title MockLPPool
 @notice Simplified mock AMM LP for demo: deposit paired native amounts, withdraw pro-rata.

@title StrategyExecutor
 @notice User-designated agent can call vault.allocateToYieldFor for that user (gas can be paid by agent).

@title SubscriptionManager
 @notice Pre-funded recurring native transfers: user deposits, creates subscription, anyone can execute when due.

@title TreasurerVault
 @notice Personal savings vault: deposit native coin, withdraw, optional auto-save bps, yield allocation accounting.
@notice Move balance from user vault into tracked "yield" (simplified internal accounting).
@notice Executor (StrategyExecutor contract) moves a user's vault into yield after user authorized agent off-chain UX.
